script_overview.title: 驿馆金影
script_overview.logline: 金使暴毙驿馆，密信暗藏和谈裂痕，谁在幕后操弄宋金命运？
script_overview.case_summary: 靖康元年，汴京郊外金人驿馆，金国使臣完颜宗弼离奇坠楼身亡。表面是酒后失足，但现场一封密信暗示其正与宋廷秘密和谈，而驿馆内另有金人武官、宋方通译、馆吏与歌伎各怀鬼胎。玩家需从遗物、证言与时间线中找出真凶，揭露破坏和谈的势力。
script_overview.public_objective: 查明金使死因，找出凶手，平息两国争端。
script_overview.player_briefing: 你可以查验现场、询问相关人物、整理线索并在最后作出取舍。

playable_identities.description: 北宋地方文吏，熟悉文书、印记和交接规程。
playable_identities.relation_to_case: 有权查验案发现场与相关簿册。
playable_identities.motive: 厘清文书失误背后的责任，避免无辜者被牵连。
limitations: 不能提前公开未证实的真相
playable_identities.background: 你随官署入场，既要顾及规程，也要找出真正能站住脚的证据。

playable_identities.description: 北宋驿路差人，熟悉行旅、马匹与夜间出入痕迹。
playable_identities.relation_to_case: 能接触驿路、仓房、后门与差役口供。
playable_identities.motive: 证明自己没有卷入案中，同时找出真正破坏规程的人。
limitations: 身份低微，不能强逼高阶人物认罪
playable_identities.background: 你在驿路上见过太多仓促交接，知道细节比响亮口供更可靠。

world.year_hint: 靖康元年冬，金兵压境之际
rules: 文书、印记、口供与现场物证需要相互印证。
人物只会透露自己在当前阶段能够合理知道的内容。

story.surface_event: 金国使臣完颜宗弼在驿馆内饮酒后坠楼身亡，现场无搏斗痕迹，初步判断为意外。
story.hidden_truth: 完颜宗弼实为宋方主战派密使所杀，此人假扮金人武官潜入驿馆，利用使臣对和谈的犹豫，以毒酒诱其至露台，趁其药发推坠，并伪造密信嫁祸宋廷主和派，意在激化宋金矛盾。
story.culprit_boundary: 真凶和包庇者必须通过完整证据链确认，任何单一口供都不足以下结论。

clues.title: 密信
clues.display_text: 从使臣枕下发现的信件，内容提及和谈条件
clues.detail: 信上笔迹与使臣日常手迹不符，且墨迹较新，疑为伪造

clues.title: 毒酒
clues.display_text: 前厅酒杯中残留的毒药，无色无味
clues.detail: 毒药为乌头碱，产自川蜀，与厨房药渣成分一致

clues.title: 药渣
clues.display_text: 厨房角落发现的白色粉末，经检验为乌头碱
clues.detail: 药渣旁有碾药痕迹，且与毒酒中的毒药相同

clues.title: 拖拽痕迹
clues.display_text: 露台地面上有拖拽痕迹，从室内延伸至栏杆断裂处
clues.detail: 痕迹显示死者曾被人拖行，而非自行坠楼

clues.title: 脚印
clues.display_text: 露台雪地上有多个脚印，其中一双鞋印与武官耶律楚材的靴子吻合
clues.detail: 脚印深浅不一，显示曾有人在此停留并用力

clues.title: 匕首
clues.display_text: 后院马厩草料中发现的短刃，刃口有血迹
clues.detail: 血迹为人血，但与死者血型不符，疑为凶手受伤所留

clues.title: 证言-赵文远
clues.display_text: 赵文远称案发前与使臣讨论和谈条款，使臣情绪激动
clues.detail: 赵文远声称自己随后返回值房，但有人看见他曾在露台附近徘徊

clues.title: 证言-柳如烟
clues.display_text: 柳如烟称案发时在露台弹唱，听到室内有争吵声
clues.detail: 她描述争吵声为两人，一高一低，但未看清面容

clues.title: 证言-孙掌柜
clues.display_text: 孙掌柜称案发时在厨房备酒，未听到异常
clues.detail: 但厨房与露台仅一墙之隔，理应听到声响，其证言可疑

clues.title: 时间线
clues.display_text: 驿馆记录显示，案发当晚各人活动时间
clues.detail: 使臣戌时三刻回房，赵文远戌时五刻离开，柳如烟亥时初离开露台，坠楼约在亥时一刻

clues.title: 地图

deductions.question: 完颜宗弼坠楼前，露台上曾发生什么？请结合【拖拽痕迹】与【脚印】分析，并说明【证言-柳如烟】中提到的争吵声是否可信。
deductions.wrong_feedback: 证据不足，请仔细检查露台痕迹与相关证言。
deductions.success_text: 露台上曾发生拖拽与争执，死者是被强行拖至栏杆处推下，柳如烟的证言证实了争吵存在，但凶手可能另有其人。

deductions.question: 毒药从何而来？请比对【毒酒】与【药渣】的成分，并调查【厨房】中可能接触药渣的人。
deductions.wrong_feedback: 线索不完整，请确认毒药来源与厨房关联。
deductions.success_text: 毒酒中的乌头碱与厨房药渣一致，说明毒药来自厨房，凶手可能利用厨房备酒之机下毒。

deductions.question: 密信是否伪造？请分析【密信】的笔迹与墨迹，并结合【时间线】中使臣回房后的活动判断。
deductions.wrong_feedback: 请仔细比对笔迹与时间线。
deductions.success_text: 密信笔迹与使臣不符，墨迹较新，且使臣回房后不久即坠楼，无暇写信，故密信为伪造，意在嫁祸。

deductions.question: 凶手是否在驿馆内？请根据【匕首】的血迹与【车辙】的线索，排查可能进出驿馆的人员。
deductions.wrong_feedback: 线索不足，请调查匕首与车辙的关联。
deductions.success_text: 匕首血迹非死者所有，车辙显示有人夜间运输，结合脚印，凶手可能为外部潜入者，但内部有人接应。

deductions.question: 耶律楚材的【地图】有何异常？他是否与宋方有联系？请结合【车辙】与【证言-孙掌柜】分析。
deductions.wrong_feedback: 请仔细查看地图标记与车辙方向。
deductions.success_text: 地图上的新路线指向宋境，车辙与之吻合，孙掌柜证言可疑，暗示耶律楚材可能与宋方主战派勾结，利用驿馆运输物资。

deductions.question: 赵文远在案发前后的行动是否矛盾？请结合【证言-赵文远】与【时间线】，并调查【通译值房】的文书。
deductions.wrong_feedback: 请核对时间线与值房情况。
deductions.success_text: 赵文远声称返回值房，但时间线显示他曾在露台附近逗留，值房文书有被翻动痕迹，他可能隐瞒了与使臣的谈话内容。

deductions.question: 柳如烟的真实身份是什么？她为何在露台弹唱？请结合【证言-柳如烟】与【密信】内容推断。
deductions.wrong_feedback: 请结合证言与密信分析。
deductions.success_text: 柳如烟实为宋廷主战派眼线，她弹唱是为了监视使臣，密信内容可能与她有关，但她并非凶手，而是目击者。

deductions.question: 综合所有线索，谁最有可能伪造密信并下毒？请从【毒酒】、【密信】、【拖拽痕迹】与【匕首】中找出关联。
deductions.wrong_feedback: 证据链不完整，请重新梳理物证与动机。
deductions.success_text: 凶手是耶律楚材，他利用厨房下毒，伪造密信，拖拽使臣坠楼，匕首血迹是他与使臣搏斗时受伤所留。

choices.title: 揭露真相，公之于众
choices.description: 将凶手与幕后势力公开，引发宋金对峙

choices.title: 私下处置，掩盖丑闻
choices.description: 秘密处决凶手，对外宣称意外，维持和谈

choices.title: 嫁祸他人，保全大局
choices.description: 将罪名推给赵文远，平息金人怒火

choices.title: 与金人合作，共查内奸
choices.description: 联合耶律楚材，揪出宋方主战派

choices.title: 伪造证据，引导舆论
choices.description: 制造假象，使金人相信是内部仇杀

endings.title: 真相大白
endings.result_summary: 凶手伏法，但宋金和谈破裂，战事再起
endings.ending_text: 你当众揭露耶律楚材的罪行，金人震怒，宋廷主和派失势，汴京城外金兵铁蹄声渐近。
endings.history_echo: 靖康之变加速，北宋覆灭的阴影笼罩中原。

endings.title: 暗流涌动
endings.result_summary: 秘密处决凶手，和谈继续，但隐患未除
endings.ending_text: 你暗中处死耶律楚材，对外宣称使臣意外身亡。和谈勉强维持，但主战派仍在暗处活动。
endings.history_echo: 数年后，金人再度南侵，和谈成果化为乌有。

endings.title: 替罪羊
endings.result_summary: 赵文远被冤杀，金人满意，但真凶逍遥
endings.ending_text: 你将罪名推给赵文远，金人接受解释，和谈得以继续。但赵文远临刑前的眼神让你夜不能寐。
endings.history_echo: 赵文远之死成为宋廷污点，后世史书语焉不详。

endings.title: 联手锄奸
endings.result_summary: 与耶律楚材合作，清除宋方主战派，和谈成功
endings.ending_text: 你与耶律楚材联手，揪出宋廷主战派密使，金人赞赏，和谈达成，两国暂得和平。
endings.history_echo: 宋金维持了数年和平，但最终仍难免一战。

endings.title: 迷雾重重
endings.result_summary: 真相被掩盖，历史留下谜团
endings.ending_text: 你伪造证据，使金人相信是内部仇杀。案件不了了之，但你知道，真正的黑手仍在暗中操纵。
endings.history_echo: 此案成为千古谜案，后世学者争论不休。

visual_assets.title: 驿馆大门主舞台图
visual_assets.prompt: 北宋 historical mystery game main scene, quiet evidence investigation tableau, wide 16:9 landscape composition for a game stage, not square, not vertical, not portrait format, no black side padding. The image must be staged around a mid-foreground evidence table, tray, stone step, or ground patch with concrete clue props on it. PRIMARY SUBJECT: one visible adult human NPC in historical clothing stands beside the evidence zone and faces the viewer or turns three-quarter toward the viewer; full face visible, eyes nose and mouth visible, full upper body visible, no cropped head, no cropped chin, no oversized torso crop, never back-facing and never face-hidden. The main person should occupy about 20-32 percent of the frame width so the environment and clue objects remain visible. Use only quiet dynasty-appropriate background architecture, not a literal illustration of the location description and not a distant exterior establishing shot. Do not make a crowd scene, army formation, cavalry scene, battlefield, parade, or line of troops; at most two small background attendants. Do not draw guard lines, troop formations, massed soldiers, horse teams, city-gate queues, or ceremonial entrances even if the story location mentions them. At least one named NPC from this list must be foreground-visible, full-body or waist-up, face and hands visible, occupying 20-32 percent of the frame width, in the same perspective and light: 耶律楚材 (appearance lock: 耶律楚材：身材魁梧，浓眉虎目，左颊一道刀疤); 赵文远 (appearance lock: 赵文远：文弱书生，三十出头，面色苍白). Additional NPCs may stand nearby, but people must not be tiny distant silhouettes. Clickable evidence objects must be clear, visible, and close to the center third of the image: 密信; 孙掌柜口供记录（用于表现抽象线索“证言-孙掌柜”的具体可见物证）; 脚印; 密信. Top-priority evidence slot contract: place these props as physical objects at the matching normalized image positions and keep them recognizable: 密信: slot_01, x=20%, y=34%, left upper mid-ground evidence zone; 孙掌柜口供记录（用于表现抽象线索“证言-孙掌柜”的具体可见物证）: slot_02, x=35%, y=34%, center-left upper mid-ground evidence zone; 脚印: slot_03, x=50%, y=34%, central upper mid-ground evidence zone; 密信: slot_04, x=65%, y=34%, center-right upper mid-ground evidence zone. Each evidence object must physically appear in the environment as a concrete prop, not as an abstract idea, not a label, not a timeline, not a diagram. Create a visible evidence zone in the middle third of the scene, such as a small table, tray, stone step, or ground patch near the main NPC, containing the named evidence objects as separate recognizable props; do not place evidence on sky, roof, high wall, signboard, plaque, or decorative text area. Keep important evidence away from image edges and away from UI-safe bottom space; leave enough empty air around each evidence object for hotspot markers. Never output an empty room, empty street, empty courtyard, object-only room, landscape-only view, architecture-only view, or horse-only scene; every scene needs a visible named human suspect or witness. NPCs, buildings, furniture, and evidence share one coherent historical light source and dynasty costume system. Dynasty material audit: Northern Song props only: ceramic wine cups and jars, lacquered wood, bamboo, silk, hemp cloth, bronze or iron tools, paper documents shown closed or sealed, oil lamps, wooden furniture, tiled roofs, and period robes. Strictly forbid laboratory glassware, conical flasks, Erlenmeyer flasks, beakers, test tubes, modern glass bottles, plastic, electric lights, printed modern labels, modern furniture, and Western modern clothing. If the location contains a gate, shop, office, room entrance, inn entrance, archive, or hall, keep all lintels and panels blank; no signboard, no plaque, no banner, no readable characters above doors. Style must match NPC portraits and clue cards: grounded Chinese historical mystery illustration, restrained realistic brushwork, no anime, no chibi, no random modern concept-art style. Use a grounded investigation camera and readable silhouettes. No modern objects, no watermark, no generated readable text, no Chinese characters, no calligraphy, no plaques, no banners, no signboards, no text-like decoration. Post-generation self-check: wide landscape ratio; main NPC centered with full face and upper body visible but not oversized; central evidence objects visible at declared slots; dynasty props only; unified style; image successfully generated. Style: 低饱和, 北宋, 历史悬疑. The clue image must show a tangible object, trace, document exterior, seal, residue, tool, fabric, footprint, rope, token, or damaged material. Never visualize abstract clues such as timeline, motive, relationship, suspicion, action chain, truth, contradiction, or evidence chain as charts or diagrams. Zero visible writing marks or symbols. For any paper, ledger, register, note, or document clue, show only a closed cover, folded blank edge, cord, seal, wax, burn, tear, stain, or smudged blank surface. Show material detail only: fold marks, damaged edge, blood trace, mud trace, burn mark, seal, fiber, or broken surface as appropriate. If the clue is a document, draw the folded, rolled, sealed, torn, or burned exterior and material surface only; do not show an open page, columns, character-like strokes, symbols, or any marks that resemble text. Do not draw a street scene, crowd, portrait, large environment, readable body text, garbled text, Chinese characters, calligraphy, symbols, timeline, diagram, relationship graph, flow chart, watermark, or modern object. Dynasty material audit: Northern Song props only: ceramic wine cups and jars, lacquered wood, bamboo, silk, hemp cloth, bronze or iron tools, paper documents shown closed or sealed, oil lamps, wooden furniture, tiled roofs, and period robes. For liquid, medicine, poison, or wine clues, use ceramic cups, ceramic jars, lacquer boxes, gourds, paper packets, or cloth wraps only; never use conical flasks, Erlenmeyer flasks, beakers, test tubes, laboratory glassware, or modern bottles. The object must be clear, near-camera, useful as a clue-card thumbnail. Post-generation self-check: one concrete object only; no abstract chart; no readable text; unified style; image successfully generated.
